zh.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Hastings於1294年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼時，她的父親John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings32歲，母親Isabel de Valence30歲。她於1314年之前與Roger de Grey在威爾士丹比爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1352年3月6日在威爾士丹比爾盧享年58歲，埋葬在威爾士丹比爾盧。

zh-hans.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Hastings于1294年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼时，她的父亲John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings32岁，母亲Isabel de Valence30岁。她于1314年之前与Roger de Grey在威尔士丹比爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1352年3月6日在威尔士丹比爾盧享年58岁，埋葬在威尔士丹比爾盧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Hastings was born in 1294, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, was 32 and her mother, Isabel de Valence, was 30. She married Roger de Grey before 1314, in Denbighshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 6 March 1352, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 58, and was buried in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Hastings est née en 1294, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Valence, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Grey avant 1314, à Denbighshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 mars 1352, à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Hastings 1294 in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings 32 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Valence 30. Sie hat vor 1314 in Denbighshire, Wales Roger de Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. März 1352 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales und wurde in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Hastings è nata il nel 1294 nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, sua padre, John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Valence, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Grey prima del 1314, nel Denbighshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 6 marzo 1352, nel Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Hastingsが1294年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで生まれた時，父John Hastings 1st Baron Hastingsは32歳，母Isabel de Valenceは30歳であった。1314年以前にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアでRoger de Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1352年3月6日にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインで58歳で死去し，ウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Hastings(이)가 1294년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Valence(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1314년 이전 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 Roger de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1352년 3월 6일 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Hastings nasceu em 1294, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Valence, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Grey antes 1314, em Denbighshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de março de 1352, em Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Hastings родилась в 1294 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Valence, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Grey перед 1314 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 6 марта 1352 г. в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Hastings nació en 1294, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Isabel de Valence, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Roger de Grey antes de 1314, en Denbighshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 6 de marzo de 1352, en Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales.
